common.searchPlaceholder: Search halal restaurants, mosques, prayer rooms...
common.offline: You are offline — showing saved data

home.heroTitle: Find trusted halal food, mosques and prayer rooms in Thailand
home.heroSubtitle: Every listing shows who verified its halal status, with evidence and date

trust.cicot_certified_desc: Holds a halal certificate issued by the Central Islamic Council of Thailand
trust.muslim_owned_desc: Ownership confirmed by our team or the owner
trust.muslim_friendly_desc: Offers suitable options — not officially certified, please ask the restaurant
trust.unverified_desc: Community or imported data awaiting verification by our team
trust.disclaimer: Halal status is compiled by Muslim Guide Thailand from the evidence shown. It is not a certification by any religious authority. Please use your own judgement.

place.thaiNameHint: Show this to your taxi driver

prayer.title: Prayer times
prayer.sourceOfficial: Official times announced by the Sheikhul Islam Office of Thailand

qibla.title: Qibla direction
qibla.compassHint: Hold your phone flat and away from metal objects
qibla.permissionNeeded: Allow compass access to use the live compass
qibla.fallbackHint: No compass? Use the arrow on the map — it points from your location toward the Kaaba

saved.title: Saved places
saved.emptyHint: Save restaurants and mosques to find them quickly — saved places work offline during your trip
saved.installHint: Install this app to keep your list safe on your device

report.title: Report information
report.intro: Help us keep information accurate. Reports are reviewed by our team and are not published.
report.halalConcernNote: Halal status concerns are investigated confidentially by our team. Please include as much detail as possible.
report.success: Thank you — our team will review your report.

auth.name: Name
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and understand my reviews, questions, and answers will be shown publicly with my name.
auth.loginToReview: Sign in to write a review

review.title: Reviews
review.reviewPlaceholder: Share your experience — food, service, facilities. Please don't post accusations; use "Report information" for halal concerns.
review.submitted: Thank you! Your review has been posted.
review.held: Thank you. Your review will appear after a quick check by our team.
review.guidelines: Reviews are about your experience. Claims about a place's halal status or other serious allegations are reviewed by our team before publishing — for halal concerns please use "Report information" instead.
review.empty: No reviews yet — be the first.
review.disclaimer: Reviews are the personal opinions of users, not of Muslim Guide Thailand. Found something inappropriate? Report it.
review.reported: Thank you, our team will review this.
review.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and understand my review will be shown publicly with my name.

merchant.claimIntro: Tell us how to reach you to verify you represent this place. Our team reviews every claim.
merchant.claimSent: Thank you — our team will review your claim.
merchant.alreadyClaimed: This place has already been claimed.
merchant.portalEmpty: You don't manage any places yet. Claim a place from its page.
merchant.editIntro: Propose changes to your listing. Edits are reviewed by our team before going live. Halal status is set by our team and can't be changed here.
merchant.editSubmitted: Thank you — your changes will appear after review.

ramadan.title: Ramadan
ramadan.bannerActive: Ramadan Mubarak — day {day}. Iftar today at {iftar}.
ramadan.notNow: It's not Ramadan right now. The next Ramadan is shown below.
ramadan.sourceOfficial: Times per the Sheikhul Islam Office of Thailand

push.title: Ramadan & Eid alerts
push.intro: Get a notification when the official Ramadan and Eid dates are announced. No account needed — you can turn this off anytime.
push.blocked: Notifications are blocked. Turn them on in your browser settings to receive alerts.
push.iosHint: On iPhone or iPad: tap the Share button, choose "Add to Home Screen", then open the app from there to turn on alerts.

qa.title: Questions & answers
qa.askPlaceholder: Ask about facilities, halal details, prayer space…
qa.questionHeld: Thank you. Your question will appear after a quick check by our team.
qa.answerHeld: Thank you. Your answer will appear after a quick check by our team.
qa.empty: No questions yet — be the first to ask.
qa.loginToAsk: Sign in to ask a question
qa.guidelines: Questions and answers are about your experience. Claims about a place's halal status or other serious allegations are reviewed before publishing — for halal concerns please use "Report information" instead.
qa.disclaimer: Answers are the personal opinions of users, not of Muslim Guide Thailand.
qa.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and understand my question or answer will be shown publicly with my name.

errors.rateLimited: You're doing that a bit too fast. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.featureDisabled: This isn't available right now. Please check back later.
errors.validation: Please check what you entered and try again.
errors.network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

takedown.intro: If you believe content on this site is unlawful or infringes your rights, submit this form. Our team reviews every request within 24 hours, as required by Thailand's MDES regulations.
takedown.contentIdHint: Not sure? Use the “Report” link on the specific place, review, or photo and this is filled in for you.
takedown.affirm: I affirm the information above is truthful.
takedown.success: Thank you. Our team will review your request within 24 hours, as required by Thai MDES regulations, and may contact you at the details you provided.
takedown.error: We couldn’t submit your request. Please check the required fields and try again.

takedowns.title: Takedown queue — 24h SLA ({count})
takedowns.note: Under MDES regulations, requests must be actioned within 24 hours of receipt. If you can’t adjudicate in time, always “hide temporarily” first (reversible). Every action is recorded in the audit log.

places.name: Name
places.submitReviewNote: Submit to the verification queue to publish (L1/L2 status must be approved by someone else).
places.fourEyesNote: Rule: setting L1 (CICOT-certified) or L2 (Muslim-owned) status must go through the verification queue reviewed by someone else (4-eyes) — do it on the “Verification” page, not by publishing directly here.
